from __future__ import annotations


class Wallet:
    def __init__(self, balance: int) -> None:
        self.balance = balance

    def transfer_to(self, peer: "Wallet", amount: int) -> None:
        self.balance -= amount
        peer.balance += amount


def method_mutates_self_and_peer_object_in_same_block_positive() -> int:
    first = Wallet(10)
    second = Wallet(0)
    first.transfer_to(second, 3)
    return second.balance
